computation of the products of two numbers with the use of
the Python language. We will learn how to build a program, write
and run it, understand its outputs, debug it, and improve it
for different cases.

In this first lesson, we will start with a problem that we would
like to solve, write an algorithm to solve it, translate it into
a program, and run the program to see how it works. In the next
lessons, we will see how to debug and improve the program.

When we write a program, many times, we start making the
program in a notebook. We read and write in the notebook. We
remember how things work. We learn the syntax of the language.
We read online tutorials. We write unit tests. We write
documentation. We check the program. We fix problems. We
repeat. We improve
